mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gas_user WHERE deleted = 0
AND user_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userNo}, '%')
AND user_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userName}, '%')
AND address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{address}, '%')
AND user_type = #{userType}

SELECT id, user_no AS userNo, user_name AS userName, user_type AS userType, area_code AS areaCode, area_name AS areaName, address, building_info AS buildingInfo, contact_phone AS contactPhone, id_card AS idCard, status, org_id AS orgId, create_time AS createTime, create_id AS createId, update_time AS updateTime, update_id AS updateId, deleted FROM gas_user WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT gu.id, gu.user_no AS userNo, gu.user_name AS userName, gu.user_type AS userType, gu.area_code AS areaCode, gu.area_name AS areaName, CONCAT( IFNULL(l1.area_name, ''), IF(l1.area_name IS NOT NULL AND l2.area_name IS NOT NULL, '/', ''), IFNULL(l2.area_name, ''), IF(l2.area_name IS NOT NULL AND l3.area_name IS NOT NULL, '/', ''), IFNULL(l3.area_name, '') ) AS areaNameDisplay, gu.address, gu.building_info AS buildingInfo, gu.contact_phone AS contactPhone, gu.id_card AS idCard, gu.status, gu.org_id AS orgId, gu.create_time AS createTime, gu.create_id AS createId, gu.update_time AS updateTime, gu.update_id AS updateId FROM gas_user gu LEFT JOIN tbl_area_node l3 ON CASE WHEN gu.area_code LIKE '%/%/%' THEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(gu.area_code, '/', -1) ELSE NULL END = l3.code LEFT JOIN tbl_area_node l2 ON CASE WHEN gu.area_code LIKE '%/%/%' THEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(gu.area_code, '/', 2), '/', -1) WHEN gu.area_code LIKE '%/%' THEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(gu.area_code, '/', -1) ELSE NULL END = l2.code LEFT JOIN tbl_area_node l1 ON CASE WHEN gu.area_code LIKE '%/%' THEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(gu.area_code, '/', 1) ELSE NULL END = l1.code WHERE gu.id = #{id} AND gu.deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gas_user ( user_no, user_name, user_type, area_code, area_name, address, building_info, contact_phone, id_card, status, org_id, create_id, update_id, deleted ) VALUES ( #{userNo}, #{userName}, #{userType}, #{areaCode}, #{areaName}, #{address}, #{buildingInfo}, #{contactPhone}, #{idCard}, #{status}, #{orgId}, #{createId}, #{updateId}, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE gas_user SET user_no = #{userNo}, user_name = #{userName}, user_type = #{userType}, area_code = #{areaCode}, area_name = #{areaName}, address = #{address}, building_info = #{buildingInfo}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, id_card = #{idCard}, status = #{status}, org_id = #{orgId}, update_id = #{updateId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

UPDATE gas_user SET deleted = 1 WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_name AS userName FROM gas_user WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY user_name
